DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HELD, PH.D., PE, ANTHONY E

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD, PH.D.'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT WITH DEFENDANT BATTENFELD TECHNOLOGIES, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE INJUNCTIVE RELIEF REQUIRED BY THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH PROP 65, THE ATTY'S FEES AND COSTS PROVIDED BY THE SETTLEMENT ARE REASONABLE UNDER CA LAW AND THE AMOUNT PAID IN CIVIL PENALTIES IS REASONABLE BASED ON THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN THE HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR # 11185, TEL. NO. (951)764-4047 (302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRIAN C. JOHNSON OF THE CHANLER LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. (510) 848-8880 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PAUL S. ROSENLUND OF DUANE MORRIS LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 957-3178 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD, PH.D.'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment with defendant Battenfeld Technologies, Inc. is Granted. No opposition was filed. The court finds that the injunctive relief required by the settlement complies with Prop 65, the atty's fees and costs provided by the settlement are reasonable under CA law and the amount paid in civil penalties is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in the Health and Safety Code. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185, Tel. No. (951)764-4047 =302/MJM
